name: ado-epic-budget-table
description: Financial budget planning table for Azure DevOps PMO Epics — fiscal year × quarterly spend, auto-computed KPIs, queryable Epic fields.
author: Deenu Gengiti

scripts.package: npm run build && npx tfx-cli extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json && mv *.vsix releases/
scripts.publish: npm run build && npx tfx-cli extension publish --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --rev-version --token ${MARKETPLACE_TOKEN}
